allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Recurse "D:\\SteamLibrary\\steamapps\\common\\State of Decay YOSE\\Game" -File | Where-Object { $_.Extension -ne "" } | Select-Object FullName, Length | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "D:\\SteamLibrary\\steamapps\\common\\State of Decay YOSE" -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "\\.\(log|txt|dmp\)$" } | Select-Object FullName, LastWriteTime, Length | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 20)
